features: Dewey rabbit is part of our Aurora's gorgeous baby range ebba, which is suitable for newborns up.
Designed especially for babies with embroidered eyes and using super soft plush materials and is suitable for any age group.
Dewey Rabbit is created from a super soft rose pink plush material
A beautiful baby Rabbit / Bunny soft toy animal which will make the perfect gift for newborns, baby showers and Christenings.
description: From Aurora's baby collection, ebba, this is is a gorgeous Rabbit / Bunny plush soft toy named Dewey. Made from super soft and cuddly blush pink material, Dewey has embroidered eyes for complete softness. This rabbit has a super cuddly body and big floppy ears. This is a perfect gift for a nursery, baby shower, birthday, christening or gifting for new parents. Dewey Rabbit is not only for babies but can be given as a gift for any occasision. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
